features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Users can switch modes reliably without losing context or causing render loops.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Stress test repeated mode switches while editing and filtering records.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: First/prev/next/last and record jump update current record and status area consistently.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Integration tests for first/prev/next/last + jump input across view modes.

features.capabilityName: Multi-request find editing and omit logic
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Find mode supports multiple requests, omit flags, and request navigation.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Test add/duplicate/delete request and omit behavior against deterministic dataset.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Found set commands modify active found set with clear status and deterministic behavior.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Integration tests for constrain and extend preserving index when possible.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Users can save, run, modify, duplicate, and delete saved finds.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Save/find/re-run/modify tests with persistence validation.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Users can persist found-set snapshots and reopen with graceful missing-record handling.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Saved found set open should skip missing ids and report reconciliation summary.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Leaving a field commits changes when allowed, without forcing explicit save each time.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Blur save test with record navigation and value persistence checks.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Dirty edits can be committed or reverted with prompts on navigation changes.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Dirty prompt tests and per-record revert behavior validations.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Validation rules block invalid commits with field-level guidance.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Validation failure tests for required/type/range/calc rules.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Auto-enter options apply timestamps, account names, serials, and calc defaults at proper times.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Create/update tests verifying auto-enter field values.

features.capabilityName: List view rendering and selection parity
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: List view supports stable row selection, keyboard navigation, and optional inline edit.
features.suggestedValidationTest: List row select + keyboard up/down tests with selection sync.

features.capabilityName: Table view column persistence and sorting
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Table columns support reorder/resize/hide and header sort behavior with persistence.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Column config persistence and header sort toggle tests.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Preview mode is read-only, shows print-like output, and supports record navigation.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Browse->Preview->Browse state-preservation tests and preview snapshot checks.

features.capabilityName: Value list controls in browse and find
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Value list controls present consistent stored/display values in browse and find criteria contexts.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Dropdown/radio/checkbox tests for display/stored mapping and find criteria.

features.capabilityName: Date control icon and calendar toggle parity
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Date controls show calendar icon when enabled and allow date picking in portal and non-portal contexts.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Visual and interaction tests for include-icon flag across view contexts.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Container fields expose insert/export/clipboard actions with permission-aware states.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Container menu action tests for insert/export with mock and filemaker sources.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Status area exposes key record/find/sort/view actions relevant to active mode.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Mode-specific status toolbar action tests with capability gating.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Menubar displays expected command groups and keyboard shortcuts execute supported commands.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Menu command and shortcut dispatch tests by mode and role.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Users can switch among workspaces/files/windows with stable context and no stale entries.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Window menu list hygiene tests and workspace switch route tests.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Runtime failures show actionable guidance while preserving debug details for developers.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Error rendering tests for known Data API failures and guidance mapping.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Field references resolve via current TO or explicit TO::Field with deterministic fallback.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Context stack tests for explicit and implicit TO field references.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Cross-file relationships route reads/writes to correct database and layout context.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Workspace-multifile integration tests for cross-file field and portal actions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Runtime can map each TO to writable layout context for Data API operations.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Routing tests for missing and resolved apiLayoutsByTableOccurrence mappings.

features.capabilityName: Found set paging and index stability
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Large found sets support stable paging and current-record index semantics.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Found set store tests for goto index, refresh, and page transitions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Sort and grouping specs drive grouped rows and summary outputs in list/table/preview.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Sort reporting tests for summary rows and grouped output stability.

features.capabilityName: Portal row rendering as template controls
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Portal rows render placed field objects and preserve control styles.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal render tests ensuring no fallback grid overlays when template children exist.

features.capabilityName: Portal active row and delete rules
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Active row state and row delete actions obey portal setup and privileges.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal active-row selection and delete action tests with allow-delete toggles.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: When relationship allows creation, bottom portal placeholder row can create related records.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal placeholder row create tests with allow-create true/false fixtures.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Portal field writes resolve to correct related record id/mod id across parent navigation.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal save regression tests across multiple parent records.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Alternate row shading only appears when configured; active row state is explicit.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Row visual state tests for alternate and active flags combinations.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Repeating fields render and commit per repetition with stable binding.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Repeating field binding tests for parse/update/commit paths.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Container assets can be fetched and uploaded without exposing Data API auth to browser.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Container GET/POST route tests with host validation and upload success.

features.capabilityName: DDR import workspace and layout normalization
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: DDR import creates normalized workspace/layout metadata ready for rendering and editing.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Import route tests with summary and direct DDR uploads, asserting workspace/layout artifacts.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Developers can snapshot, diff, and assess schema changes across versions/files.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Dev tools tests for snapshot creation and diff result determinism.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: TO relationships can be explored visually, including cross-file edges.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Graph builder tests and developer tools UI filter/search interactions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Developers can access schema snapshots, diffs, impacts, and migrations in one place.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Dev tools API and panel tests for snapshot->diff->impact workflows.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Schema diffs can become ordered migration plans with safety metadata.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Migration generate/apply unit tests with reversible and destructive flags.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Change impact reports identify broken references and affected artifacts.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Impact analysis tests for deleted field references.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Snapshots are stable and comparable across runs.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Snapshot normalization tests with stable ordering assertions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Manage/app-layer items are implemented, partial, or disabled with rationale and docs links.
features.suggestedValidationTest: App-layer capability tests for enabled/disabled behavior and rationale modal.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Manager screens include context selectors for multi-file workspaces.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Manager screen tests for file selector state changes.

features.capabilityName: Unsaved changes protection in app-layer dialogs
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Closing dirty dialogs prompts user before discarding changes.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Dialog close interception tests with dirty state.

features.capabilityName: UI regression suite for high-risk parity flows
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Key UI flows are covered by regression tests to prevent repeated break/fix cycles.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Run test:ui-regression with portal + mode-switch + menu-action fixtures.

features.capabilityName: Layout fidelity harness and baseline update flow
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Visual fidelity regressions are detected with screenshot baselines and metric reports.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Run test:layout-fidelity and baseline update scripts with fixture manifest.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: CI outputs parity status summaries for key domains before release.
features.suggestedValidationTest: CI workflow test to assert parity checklist files generated and non-empty.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Layout Mode supports precise click, shift-click, and marquee selection with deterministic selection sets.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Run pointer interaction tests for click, shift-click, marquee-add, marquee-remove across grouped and portal objects.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Grouped objects move and resize as a unit while preserving child relative geometry.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Group/un-group roundtrip tests must preserve child bounds and z-order.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Arrange commands deterministically change object stacking order.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Z-order point-hit tests across overlapping object fixtures.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Align/distribute uses selected object boundary math similar to FileMaker.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Unit tests for left/right/top/bottom/center align and distribute spacing on mixed selections.

features.capabilityName: Rulers and guides with snap behavior
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Rulers and guides are visually aligned to canvas coordinates and snapping toggles.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Visual regressions at different zoom levels for ruler ticks and guide intersections.

features.capabilityName: Canvas lock and autosize anchor editing
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Canvas can be locked in Layout Mode while autosize anchor metadata remains editable.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Mutation commands should no-op when canvas locked; anchor props still persist.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Header/body/footer and summary parts resize with expected object repositioning semantics.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Part resize tests verify object y-offset transforms for adjacent parts.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Dragging fields onto layout can create field+label patterns with consistent placement modes.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Drag field placement snapshot tests for side-by-side and stacked modes.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Inspector edits x/y/width/height and z values directly with immediate visual update.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Inspector value updates should mutate selected object and persist to layout JSON.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Font, size, color, alignment, borders, fills, shadows map to object styles.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Style field changes must persist and map to runtime style resolver output.

features.capabilityName: Conditional formatting and hide condition editors
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Developers can define conditional style and visibility rules at object level.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Rule save + runtime eval tests for hideObjectWhen and conditional formatting outputs.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Field objects support control types and display options matching inspector settings.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Render each control type in layout and browse mode and assert visual affordances.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Buttons support script/layout actions; button bars support segment configuration.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Button action bindings should execute correct runtime command in browse mode.

features.capabilityName: Tab control and slide control authoring
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Panel objects support tab labels, default tab, and panel navigation properties.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Panel config changes should alter browse-mode panel behavior and active tab serialization.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Popover button and popover panel metadata can be configured in layout mode.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Popover config persists and runtime popover opens with expected geometry and title.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Portal setup supports rows, sorting, filtering, delete permission, and row state toggles.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal setup changes should alter browse-mode portal rendering and behavior.

features.capabilityName: Portal template row editing in layout mode
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Related fields are positioned in portal template row and row separator is visible.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Visual regression for portal layout mode with only native separator/overlay elements.

features.capabilityName: Create New Layout wizard with templates
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: New Layout flow offers template choices and generates reasonable starter layout structures.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Template selection should produce expected parts and starter object sets.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Copy/paste/duplicate operations preserve style/binding semantics and assign new ids.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Duplicated objects must receive unique ids and retain props except identity.

features.capabilityName: Set Tab Order mode and validation
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Tab order editing overlays numeric sequence and resolves to deterministic runtime order.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Tab order assignment and runtime traversal tests for hidden/disabled/portal contexts.

features.capabilityName: Found set paging for large datasets
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Large found sets avoid full in-memory ids and support page-based navigation.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Found set paging benchmarks with synthetic 100k scenarios.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: List and table rendering use virtualization for large record sets.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Virtual window tests for visible range correctness.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Portal rows are incrementally rendered/paged for large related sets.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Portal benchmark tests with high row counts and edit interactions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Repeated identical read requests share cache/in-flight promises.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Request cache tests validating hits/misses and coalescing.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Transient Data API failures are retried with bounded backoff and circuit state tracking.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Circuit breaker and retry unit tests with transient error simulation.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Calc evaluations are bounded and re-evaluated only when dependencies change.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Calc evaluation count tests after unrelated field edits.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Script runtime avoids unnecessary context rebuilds and reports step timing.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Advanced script tests and perf metrics validation.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Developers can correlate UI actions with API and runtime metrics.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Profiler output schema tests and trace-id propagation checks.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Performance benchmarks are repeatable and can gate CI regressions.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Benchmark script deterministic output checks.

features.capabilityName: Bounded cache and trace memory usage
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Long sessions should avoid unbounded growth in cache and diagnostics buffers.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Stress tests with cache eviction assertions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: OnLayoutEnter/OnLayoutExit trigger hooks fire in deterministic order.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Trigger sequencing tests across layout switch scenarios.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: OnModeEnter/OnModeExit fire when switching browse/find/preview modes.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Mode switch trigger tests with expected history order.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Field focus and edit lifecycle triggers fire with predictable debounce semantics.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Input typing tests with OnObjectModify count and OnObjectExit commit interactions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: OnRecordCommitRequest can cancel commit before persistence.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Commit request policy tests for veto and allow paths.

features.capabilityName: Script call stack and local/global variable scopes
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Nested Perform Script calls preserve local $ vars per frame and shared $$ globals.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Nested script tests verifying scope isolation and return semantics.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Common script steps (go to layout, set field, commit, find, loop) execute deterministically.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Script engine fixture tests for common step sequences and control flow.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Set Error Capture controls halt/continue behavior and updates last error/message state.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Error capture tests with failing actions and nested scripts.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Script-level transaction begin/commit/revert semantics stage and apply operations predictably.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Transaction manager tests for partial failure rollback behavior.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Unsupported local steps can bridge to server script execution with result propagation.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Script execution route tests for runtime fallback to /api/fm/scripts.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Debugger supports stepping and call-stack inspection in dev workflows.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Debug-step tests confirm deterministic advancement and state snapshots.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Data Viewer displays current values and watch expressions in runtime context.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Data viewer tests for expression evaluation against current context.

features.capabilityName: Menu and button action -> script routing
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: UI actions route to configured scripts with parameters and context.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Action dispatch tests for button/menu commands with parameter passing.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Developers can see trigger firing order and outcomes in debug tools.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Debug snapshot tests include ordered trigger history and outcomes.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Plugin SDK can register custom script steps with validation and isolated failures.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Plugin SDK tests for custom step registration and execution isolation.

features.capabilityName: Script context stack alignment with windows
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Script context resolves active window/layout/record correctly in multi-window sessions.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Kernel tests for script context in focused and card windows.

features.capabilityName: Session auth middleware and role context
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: API requests derive authenticated user/role context before executing privileged actions.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Request guard tests for authenticated and unauthenticated API calls.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Deployment can use trusted-header SSO or JWT modes without client secrets.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Security hardening tests for JWT validation and trusted-header mode.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Mutating API calls require valid CSRF cookie/header pairs when enabled.
features.suggestedValidationTest: CSRF mismatch tests return 403 with guidance.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Request bursts are controlled and users receive retry guidance when throttled.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Middleware rate-limit tests for 429 responses and retry-after headers.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Every API route validates role permission for requested action.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Authorization denial tests for restricted actions.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: UI actions respect role-based runtime permissions for view/edit/delete operations.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Runtime capability tests for read-only and hidden field scenarios.

features.capabilityName: Structured audit logging for critical actions
features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Login, CRUD, script, routing, and management actions emit audit events.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Audit log tests for event append and query filtering.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Admin users can inspect health, metrics, and active diagnostics safely.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Admin endpoint role checks and payload schema tests.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Container fetch route rejects external host URLs to avoid leakage and SSRF risk.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Container route tests for host mismatch rejection.

features.expectedFileMakerBehavior: Versioning, promote, rollback, and admin workflows are role-restricted.
features.suggestedValidationTest: Governance tests for admin/developer/runtime role access differences.
